indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for sleep as they lack the necessary height and backrest support for comfortable lying.

indicators.name: chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are not suitable for sleep as they lack the necessary height and backrest support for comfortable lying.

indicators.name: high ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can make the space feel too open and noisy, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows can let in too much light and noise, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring can be noisy and uncomfortable to lie on, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: no visible bed
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed makes it impossible to perform the primary sleep activity.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The presence of couches and chairs instead of a bed, combined with high ceilings, large windows, and hard flooring, makes it unsuitable for sleep. The absence of a bed is the most critical issue, as it is the primary artifact for sleep.
